section: SCHEDULE D - LIABILITIES / SCHEDULE E - POSITIONS
free_text:
# SCHEDULE D - LIABILITIES

Name: Rohit Khanna
Page 367 of 367

Instructions (printed form text): Report liabilities of over $10,000 owed to any one creditor at any time during the reporting period by you, your spouse, or your dependent child. Mark the highest amount owed during the reporting period. Members are required to report all liabilities secured by real property including mortgages on their personal residence. Exclude: Any mortgage on personal residence (unless you rent it out or are a Member); loans secured by automobiles, household furniture, or appliances; liabilities of a business in which you own an interest (unless you are personally liable); and liabilities owed to you by a spouse or the child, parent, or sibling of you or your spouse. Report a revolving charge account (i.e., credit card) only if the balance at the close of the reporting period exceeded $10,000. *Column K is for liabilities held solely by your spouse or dependent child.

Amount of Liability columns: A $10,001-$15,000; B $15,001-$50,000; C $50,001-$100,000; D $100,001-$250,000; E $250,001-$500,000; F $500,001-$1,000,000; G $1,000,001-$5,000,000; H $5,000,001-$25,000,000; I $25,000,001-$50,000,000; J Over $50,000,000; K Over $1,000,000* (Spouse/DC Liability).

Example row (pre-printed): First Bank of Wilmington, DE / Mortgage on Rental Property, Dover, DE / X in column D.

## Liability entries

| SP/DC/JT | Creditor | Date Liability Incurred MO/YR | Type of Liability | Amount of Liability |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| (blank) | Nelnet | 04/03 | Student Loan | C: $50,001-$100,000 (checkmark) |

# SCHEDULE E - POSITIONS

Instructions (printed form text): Report all positions, compensated or uncompensated, held during the current or prior calendar year as an officer, director, trustee of an organization, partner, proprietor, representative, employee, or consultant of any corporation, firm, partnership, or other business enterprise, nonprofit organization, labor organization, or educational or other institution other than the United States. Exclude positions held in religious, social, fraternal, or political entities and positions solely of an honorary nature.

No filed Schedule E position entries are visible on this page.

Footer: Use additional sheets if more space is required.
